query:
SELECT sm.user_id
            FROM server_members sm
            WHERE sm.server_id = $1
              AND sm.user_id = ANY($2)
              AND (
                  $3 = false
                  OR sm.role IN ($5, $6)
                  OR EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1 FROM channel_role_access cra
                      WHERE cra.channel_id = $4 AND cra.role = sm.role
                  )
              )
